StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(an1.name) AS costume_designer_pseudo, MIN(t.title) AS movie_with_costumes FROM job.aka_name AS an1, job.cast_info AS ci, job.company_name AS cn, job.movie_companies AS mc, job.name AS n1, job.role_type AS rt, job.title AS t WHERE cn.country_code ='[us]' AND rt.role ='costume designer' AND an1.person_id = n1.id AND n1.id = ci.person_id AND ci.movie_id = t.id AND t.id = mc.movie_id AND mc.company_id = cn.id AND ci.role_id = rt.id AND an1.person_id = ci.person_id AND ci.movie_id = mc.movie_id
